response.justification: Nearly two decades of hands-on fullstack experience with strong alignment to the core stack — TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes — plus current, directly relevant AI-agent and MCP tooling work, which the role explicitly requires. Demonstrated craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and teaching/workshop experience suggest strong code-review and collaboration fit. Gaps are minor: no explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience, and Kotlin/Python are absent from the skills list, though Java and broad polyglot history mitigate this.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js/React experience across multiple senior roles, well beyond the 6-year requirement
Current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work directly matches the role's AI agent development requirement
Strong testing culture and craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, authored testing libraries and courses)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed, though adjacent frameworks are covered
Kotlin and Python not in skills list; secondary-stack coverage rests on Java alone
Significant portion of past work in niche DLang ecosystem rather than the primary stack
